items.title: Terrible GTA Trilogy remasters were actually enjoyed by "a lot of people," says studio boss who "agreed with most of the people's reactions"
items.summary: He believes better remasters can only come from Rockstar

items.title: World Cup Star Erling Haaland Shows Off His Gaming Setup, Wants Xbox To Sponsor Him, And Is Excited For GTA 6
items.summary: If you've been watching the World Cup or soccer in general, you're surely familiar with Norwegian striker Erling Haaland, and now he's provided a deeper window into his life and specifically his gaming habits. items.title: GTA 6 developer Rockstar accused of enforcing crunch, weaponising bonus payments, and ignoring a widening gender pay gap
items.summary: As Rockstar employees move to pursue official union recognition following a series of high-profile sackings in 2025, new allegations are emerging related to Rockstar's treatment of its staff. In a new report published by Game Developer , multiple Rockstar developers have accused the company of failing to address gen…

items.title: Surprising no one, GTA 6 is at the top of the PlayStation Store in practically every country in the world
items.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 is topping the PlayStation Store charts across nearly every regional version of Sony's digital store. Since pre-orders went live on 25th June , the game has shot to the top of the various PS Stores worldwide. Read more
